title: Event
description: Something that happened in time and space. An Event COMPOSES smaller units: it references places + features and carries a temporal extent. This is the mechanism by which individual map units connect into a meaningful happening. (Dates are an attribute OF an event — not the atomic unit.)

temporal.description: Time extent. 'start' recommended; omit both only for genuinely undated/disputed events. 'end' omitted = instantaneous.

features.description: Map features depicting this event (routes, markers, regions).

people.description: Actors involved. Kept inline + simple now; can be promoted to a first-class entity later.
